===[[Pokémon Pokopia]]===
Misty is the subject of the [[Human Records|Human Record]] "Unmasking the True Misty!", which can be found on a cliff overlooking the northeastern section of [[Withered Wasteland]]. Reading this record rewards {{poko|Ditto}} with the "Mermaid hair" hairstyle, which resembles Misty's own hairstyle.
